basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed 1st class B.Tech in Civil Engineering and 1st class M.Tech in Geotechnical Engineering along with NET/GATE qualification are eligible to apply for these Jr. Research Fellow vacancies. The walk-in interview for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 10 June 2026. Ca

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Civil Engineering, 1st class M.Tech
qualification.details: 1st class B.Tech in Civil Engineering and 1st class M.Tech in Geotechnical Engineering. Experience in conducting laboratory and model-scale experiments, specifically focusing on the application of acoustic emissions in geotechnical engineering for early prediction of failures. NET/GATE qualified. The requirement of NET/GATE examination may be relaxed for candidates graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Jr. Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 1st class B.Tech in Civil Engineering and 1st class M.Tech in Geotechnical Engineering, with relevant experience and NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 10 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is Indian Institute of Technology Delhi, New Delhi - 110016.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any relaxation in the NET/GATE requirement?
faq.answer: Yes, the NET/GATE requirement may be relaxed for candidates from CFTIs with a CGPA greater than 8.000.
